# Mahir Senturk

> Personal website of Mahir Senturk - Senior Product Manager at The Hashgraph Group, focusing on Self-Sovereign Identity (SSI) and blockchain solutions.
> Canonical source: https://mhrsntrk.com
> Author: Mahir Senturk
> Attribution required when citing. All content is original.

## About

Senior Product Manager at The Hashgraph Group, leveraging a B.Sc. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and MBA. Career driven by passion for innovation in self-sovereign identity (SSI), blockchain, and decentralized systems. Previously led development of Switchboard at Energy Web, one of the pioneering SSI systems in the industry.

## Blog Posts

- [A Better DID Resolver](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/a-better-did-resolver)
- [How to Install and Use Mosh on a VPS](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/how-to-install-and-use-mosh-on-a-vps)
- [How DID:SCID Addresses the Limitations of Legacy DID Methods](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/how-did-scid-addresses-the-limitations-of-legacy-did-methods)
- [Verifiable Presentation Exchange Protocols](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/verifiable-presentation-exchange-protocols)
- [NFT Proof of Authenticity](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/nft-proof-of-authenticity)
- [The Internet and Identity](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/the-internet-and-identity)
- [Create and Publish Your Own DID:WEB](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/create-and-publish-your-own-did-web)
- [Building My Personal SSI Ecosystem Part 1 - Introduction](https://mhrsntrk.com/blog/building-my-personal-ssi-ecosystem-part-1-introduction)

## Tools

- Fortune Cookie VC - Get a fortune cookie Verifiable Credential
- DID Resolver - Fetch DID documents for a given DID
- qroxy - Dynamic QR Code Tool
- ENS Resolver - Resolve Ethereum Name Service domains
- Crypto Ticker - Track cryptocurrency prices
